caption: A middle-aged man with short dark hair and a mustache is speaking while seated inside a vehicle, likely an ambulance, as indicated by the white interior and a glimpse of a blue star-of-life emblem on a window behind him. He is wearing a light gray polo shirt with a small dark logo on the chest. Throughout the sequence, the man maintains a somber facial expression, his mouth moving as he speaks. The camera remains in a static close-up shot, focusing on his head and shoulders. White subtitles appear at the bottom of the frame in every shot, reading "One of the cases that I remember was very sad". There is very little movement between the frames, with only subtle shifts in the man's facial expressions and lip movements as he continues his sentence.
